title: [WIP] Investigate missing API documentation
body:
- [x] Investigate why API docs are empty
  - Root cause: `GenerateDocumentationFile` was not enabled in any project
  - Root cause: Zero XML doc comments existed in any source file
  - Result: DocFX generates API pages from DLLs but they have no descriptions
- [x] Enable `GenerateDocumentationFile` in `source/Directory.Build.props`
- [x] Add XML doc comments to SkiaSharp.Extended public types and members
  - [x] `SKBlurHash` (BlurHash encoding/decoding)
  - [x] `SKPixelComparer` (image comparison)
  - [x] `SKPixelComparisonResult` (comparison result data)
  - [x] `SKGeometry` (geometry helpers)
  - [x] `SKGeometryExtensions` (canvas extension methods)
  - [x] `SKPathInterpolation` (path interpolation)
- [ ] Add XML doc comments to SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui public types and members
  - [ ] Confetti controls and types
  - [ ] Lottie controls and types
  - [ ] Base surface views
- [ ] Build and verify documentation generation
- [ ] Run code review and security checks

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

💬 We'd love your input! Share your thoughts on Copilot coding agent in our [2 minute survey](https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-survey).
